text:
A short educational article about limits and derivatives. It explains how a function can approach a value and why local change is useful in optimization. Paragraph 1 keeps the same topic but adds another detail for chunking. The goal is not to create a real benchmark, but to have text that is long enough for a smoke test of paragraph-based segmentation. A later stage will attach domain labels and compute model log probabilities. This paragraph is intentionally plain and repeatable so that the local demo runs fast.
